en: Yeah, all right. You've got me today.
ko: 그래, 알겠어. 오늘은 내가 너를 잡았네.

en: Coach, do you or the organisation condone what Isaac McAdoo did today?
ko: 코치님, 오늘 아이작 맥아두가 한 행동을 당신이나 조직이 용납하나요?

en: What Isaac did was awful. He was lucky he only got a red card.
ko: 아이작이 한 행동은 끔찍했어. 그는 빨간 카드만 받은 게 다행이야.

en: OK, so why do you do it?
So why do you do it?
When I was first coming up through Sunderland,
there was an old-timer on the team, local guy.
ko: 팀에 오래된 선수 한 명이 있었어, 지역 사람.

en: He and his wife were about to have their first kids,
ko: 그와 그의 아내는 첫 아이를 가질 예정이었고,

en: I made a joke that statistically I was probably the real dad.
ko: 통계적으로 내가 진짜 아빠일 가능성이 있다고 농담을 했어.
